message:
chore: generalize root-level test script gitignore from /test_hash.rs to /test_*.rs

Widen the gitignore pattern so all one-off scratch test files at the repo
root (test_clamp.rs, test_hash.rs, etc.) are excluded by default, rather
than requiring a new entry for each ephemeral test file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -124,7 +124,7 @@ test_meminfo
 bench_*.db
 
 # One-off test scripts at repo root
-/test_hash.rs
+/test_*.rs
 
 # Agent session ephemeral files
 SESSION_TODO.md
